# No Lag Mind

> No Lag Mind is a native, local-first note app with zero-lag editing, wikilinks, slash commands, and a search bar that does what you say. Built with Tauri, not Electron. The core app is free.

## Purpose

A high-performance, zero-latency, local-first note-taking app for macOS.

## Core Features

- Ultra-fast launch and zero-lag typing — no loading spinners, no mode switches
- Minimal UI, no bloat
- Instant local storage — notes save themselves, nothing waits on a network round trip
- Frictionless capture via wikilinks (`[[`), slash commands (`/`), and colon commands (`:`)

## Ideal Use Case

A fast scratchpad and distraction-free note-taking app for people who think faster than most apps can keep up with.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://nolagmind.com/): product overview, features, and pricing
- [Download](https://nolagmind.com/download): get the macOS (Apple Silicon) build
- [Docs](https://nolagmind.com/docs): usage and feature documentation
- [Changelog](https://nolagmind.com/changelog): release history
- [Blog](https://nolagmind.com/blog): writing on programming, keyboard-driven workflows, and building a note app from scratch

## Blog posts

- [No Lag Mind vs. Obsidian](https://nolagmind.com/blog/no-lag-mind-vs-obsidian): a direct comparison covering speed, flexibility, and built-in features vs. Obsidian's plugin ecosystem
